ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the individual (e.g., faculty, student, researcher) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "degrees" (
  "degree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each degree */,
  "degree_name" TEXT /* Name of the degree (e.g., Doctor of Philosophy, Master in Education) */,
  "field_of_study" INTEGER /* Field of study (e.g., Education, Commerce) */,
  "degree_type" INTEGER /* Type of degree (e.g., Ph.D., M.Ed., B.Ed.) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the degree program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the degree record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the degree record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("degree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_degrees_degree_type FOREIGN KEY ("degree_type") REFERENCES degree_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_degrees_field_of_study FOREIGN KEY ("field_of_study") REFERENCES fields_of_study ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university or board */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university or board */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the university or board */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the university or board */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the university is located */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the university */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the university record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the university record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "degree_id" INTEGER /* ID of the degree obtained */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university or board */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of completion or current status (e.g., 2013, Currently Pursuing) */,
  "division" INTEGER /* Division obtained (e.g., 1st, 2nd) */,
  "percent" TEXT /* Percent obtained (e.g., 81, 76.6) */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Status of the degree (e.g., Completed, Currently Pursuing) */,
  "thesis_title" TEXT /* Title of the thesis for doctoral degrees */,
  "advisor" TEXT /* Name of the advisor for the degree */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the academic record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the academic record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_records_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_records_degree_id FOREIGN KEY ("degree_id") REFERENCES degrees ("degree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_records_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_records_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES academic_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_records_division FOREIGN KEY ("division") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields_of_study" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field of study */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field of study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the field of study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the field of study record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the field of study record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "degree_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each degree type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the degree type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the degree type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the degree type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the degree type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the division record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the division record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the academic status record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the academic status record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
